zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Davenport於1438年出生在英國英格蘭爾亨波瑞時，她的父親Hugh Davenport III9歲，母親Ellen Massey of Tatton33歲。她於1453年與Randall Mainwaring III在英國爾普雷斯特波利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1504年在英國英格蘭爾諾波利享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Davenport于1438年出生在英国英格兰爾亨波瑞时，她的父亲Hugh Davenport III9岁，母亲Ellen Massey of Tatton33岁。她于1453年与Randall Mainwaring III在英国爾普雷斯特波利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1504年在英国英格兰爾諾波利享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Davenport was born in 1438, in Henbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh Davenport III, was 9 and her mother, Ellen Massey of Tatton, was 33. She married Randall Mainwaring III in 1453, in Prestbury, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1504, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Davenport est née en 1438, à Henbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Davenport III, avait 9 ans et sa mère, Ellen Massey of Tatton, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Randall Mainwaring III en 1453, à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1504, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Davenport 1438 in Henbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Davenport III 9 und ihre Mutter Ellen Massey of Tatton 33. Sie hat 1453 in Prestbury, Cheshire, England Randall Mainwaring III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1504 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Norbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Davenport è nata il nel 1438 nel Henbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh Davenport III, aveva 9 anni e sua madre, Ellen Massey of Tatton, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Randall Mainwaring III nel 1453, nel Prestbury, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1504, nel Norbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Davenportが1438年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヘンブリーで生まれた時，父Hugh Davenport IIIは9歳，母Ellen Massey of Tattonは33歳であった。1453年にイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーでRandall Mainwaring IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1504年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Davenport(이)가 1438년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 헨버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Davenport III(은)는 9세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Massey of Tatton(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1453년 영국 체실르 플레스트버이에서 Randall Mainwaring III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르버이에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Davenport nasceu em 1438, em Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh Davenport III, tinha 9 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Massey of Tatton, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Randall Mainwaring III em 1453, em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1504, em Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Davenport родилась в 1438 г. в местности хенбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh Davenport III было 9 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Massey of Tatton, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Randall Mainwaring III в 1453 г. в местности престбури, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1504 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Davenport nació en 1438, en Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh Davenport III, tenía 9 años y su mamá, Ellen Massey of Tatton, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Randall Mainwaring III en 1453, en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1504, en Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años.
